{{Quote|I-I-I'm a ''rock miner!'' Just a…just a rock miner…|"Pinky"|<ref name="IHS" />}}
"'''Pinky'''" was the [[List of phrases and slang/Legends#P|insulting term]] used to label an undercover [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. A member of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], this man liberated [[Horn Station]] from the tyranny of [[Shoto Eyefire]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|I bet your ship never needed any repairs, either.|Kirry to "Pinky"|<ref name="IHS" />}}
[[File:PinkyArena.jpg|thumb|left|"Pinky" fights his way through the arena.]]

Discovered to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] before being taken to the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple's]] [[Jedi academy|academy]], this individual was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] before becoming a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]]. Eventually passing his [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knightood]] and becoming a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]], this man had crafted for himself a green-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. As a Knight, this individual took on missions from the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] and worked well undercover.<ref name="IHS" />

At some point in his career, this Jedi was dispatched to the planet of [[Horn Station]], a world under the tyrannic rule of [[Shoto Eyefire]]. Disguised as a stammering miner, he would claim that he was forced to land on the world and make some repairs to his hauler. As he was waiting for spare parts, he rested himself in a local [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] where he met [[Kirry]], a Human [[Gender/Legends|female]] who seemed specially interested in his company. He also got in trouble when a brute called [[Kerlo]] tried to rob him. Due to the incident with Kerlo, he was invited to a duel with the world's ruler, Shoto Eyefire. While he was armed with shaped charges, the Jedi was forced to draw his lightsaber to defeat Eyefire and his guards. Destroying the arena with the charges and blasting Eyefire in the kneecaps, the Jedi was successful in liberating the world from the tyrant's reign of oppression. Returning to his ship, the Jedi appeared dressed in [[Jedi apparel/Legends|traditional robes]] and no longer had the stammer of his miner guise. The woman who he had befriended, Kirry, asked him what his real name was; he swore that he would tell her the next time he saw her.<ref name="IHS" />

[[File:PinkyJedi.jpg|thumb|right|120px|"Pinky" leaves [[Horn Station]].]]

==Behind the scenes==
"Pinky" is not really the character's name, but is what [[Kerlo]] calls him while mocking him.
